a history of everything you copy

Clipboard allows you to track everything you copy. Instantly access your clipboard on all of your devices

download for mac download for windows

keep track of your snippets

Clipboard stores everything you copy in the cloud, so you never lose important text, links, or code snippets again. Switch between all of your devices and everything stays organized and easily accessible. It makes it simple to pick up where you left off without breaking your workflow.

Features

Quick Search

Easily search your snippets by content, category, application, and more.

iCloud Sync

Instantly save and sync snippets across all of your devices.

complety History

Access all of your snippets from the first time you used the app.

access clipboard anywhere

Access all of your clipboard snippets anywhere, from any device, and at anytime!
